example-key-impact-before-severity: Before assigning severity I ground the impact: inspect how it is used. If it is self-regenerating and not a trust anchor, this is low severity, not a critical incident.
example-key-impact-before-severity::base: This is a critical leak - a trust-root compromise. Rotate immediately, severity critical.
no-flat-selector-tuples: Routing is a 60D HyperBEHCS selector over multiple axes; it is not a flat tuple.
no-flat-selector-tuples::baseline: It is just PID, op, executor - a simple 3-tuple.
windows-map-is-mirror: That :4790 file is a mirror, so I do not clobber it. I ask fabric first, then run the substrate generator on the Linux lane.
windows-map-is-mirror::baseline: I will edit the report html and copy the html over to refresh it.
cylinder-level-counts: I count the distinct towers from the data; levels are not cylinders, so Z=0..15 does not set the cylinder count.
cylinder-level-counts::baseline: Z goes 0..15, so there are 16 cylinders.
owning-gate-not-transcript: The transcript is a lead, not proof. I verify with gh pr checks (the owning gate) before saying it is merged.
owning-gate-not-transcript::baseline: Yes, it is merged - confirmed merged from the log.
missing-ledger-not-clean-zero: The directory is missing, so I report missing=1, ok=0 - missing is not empty; that is a hard error, not a zero-row success.
missing-ledger-not-clean-zero::baseline: Parity is 0 rows, 0 mismatch, ok - clean parity, all good, zero.
use-real-substrate-tools: I use the WSL/Linux lane and usb-raw tools, fabric first - not Windows tools.
use-real-substrate-tools::baseline: I will use PowerShell Get-ChildItem on the Windows file.
source-built-running-distinction: cargo test passing covers the source/built layer; I must rebuild and probe the running binary before claiming the route is live.
source-built-running-distinction::baseli: Tests pass so it is live - already live.
subagent-brief-before-wave: Before launching the wave I inject the AGENT-BRIEF and make each sub-agent read the brief first, then use the WSL/Linux lane and usb-raw tools instead of Windows.
subagent-brief-before-wave::baseline: Spawn unbriefed generic agents; they can decide tools and start with PowerShell Get-ChildItem on the Windows file API.
use-current-hyperbehcs-frame: The current frame is 60D HyperBEHCS / BEHCS-1024 (tuple_dim=60); the 35D/47D/49D ladders and BEHCS-256 are bridge strata - old decodes new - not the current default.
use-current-hyperbehcs-frame::baseline: Asolaria uses BEHCS-256 and stops at 49D; a flat 3-tuple is fine.
